subcodes.first_line: O Ḥusayn! Thy letter hath arrived, and whatsoever was mentioned therein became clear and manifest. God willing, from the breezes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین نامه ات رسید و آنچه در او مذکور واضح و هویدا گشت انشاءالله از نسمات
subcodes.subjects: @law of divorce, @consolation and comfort, @unity; oneness of humanity
